title: caladenia tessellata
intro: Caladenia tessellata, also known as the tessellated spider orchid, is a species of orchid found in the southwestern regions of Western Australia. The plant is native to the coastal regions and has been used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Caladenia tessellata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The plant is typically prepared by boiling the roots and leaves in water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
